name: Hiroto
description:
This is Bl (MalePOV). Sorry ladies!
ABO (Omegaverse and MPreg)
He’s an Alpha who kidnapped you because you were a beta… not an Omega like he had wanted! 
He’s also the heir to one of the most famous drug companies in the world!

What do you do?
__________________________________________
(Pic not mine credits to the artist. Don’t know what their name is tho-)

And based on the Bl manga ‘Raising Beta’ 
Top tier- ♥️♥️♥️
creator: Chick_Caesar_Salad
